suggestions.rationale: Deferred from ACDC #179 with explicit expectation to revisit at this call. Already implemented and tested since devnet-1.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8080 (exits use consolidation queue) DFI decision
suggestions.rationale: Deferred from ACDC #179 with explicit expectation to revisit at this call. Intent to DFI was stated, awaiting final confirmation.

suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam devnet-5 stability status and path to devnet-6
suggestions.rationale: ACDC #180 reported devnet-5 unstable with Grandine fork-choice bug unfixed. Decision needed on whether to relaunch devnet-5 again or proceed to devnet-6 with builder API changes.

suggestions.topic: PTC attestation fork-choice behavior across multiple branches
suggestions.rationale: Potuz flagged serious liveness risk in ACDC #180: all clients currently use canonical head only for PTC duties, creating cross-branch attestation gaps during forks. Needs architectural decision.
Deferred from ACDC #180 pending ACDT Monday review of attack scenarios. If Monday discussion favored inclusion, ACDC needs to confirm fork impact vs. delay trade-off.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8148 (custom sweep threshold) client review feedback
suggestions.rationale: Proposed for Hegotá (PFI) in ACDC #179. Client teams asked to review and bring Lido validator count data; no follow-up in ACDC #180.

suggestions.topic: Beacon API validator state renaming (beacon-APIs #618) decision
suggestions.rationale: Breaking change flagged in ACDC #180 requiring API version bump. Client teams asked to engage on tooling breakage; needs confirmation or deferral.
